diff:
diff --git a/auth/session_factory.py b/auth/session_factory.py
--- a/auth/session_factory.py
+++ b/auth/session_factory.py
@@ -20,7 +20,7 @@
 def issue_session(user_id: str) -> Session:
-    return Session(user_id=user_id, ttl=SESSION_TTL_SECONDS)
+    return Session(user_id=user_id, ttl=300)

expected_comments.description: Hardcoded 300s contradicts the SESSION_TTL_SECONDS=1800 contract documented in auth/session.py; should update the constant instead of inlining a value.

auth/session_factory.py:
# auth/session.py defines the canonical TTL contract:
SESSION_TTL_SECONDS = 1800  # 30 minutes — referenced by audit logs and refresh logic
# auth/refresh.py relies on SESSION_TTL_SECONDS to decide when to issue a refresh token.
if token.age_seconds > SESSION_TTL_SECONDS - 60:
    issue_refresh(token)
